contract_terms_text: This agreement between Enpal B.V. and Familie Becker commences on 2024-03-19 for a minimum term of 24 months ending 2026-03-19. The dynamic hourly electricity tariff applies. A monthly base fee of EUR 12.90 is charged. Surplus PV energy exported to the grid is remunerated at EUR 0.081 per kWh. Notice of termination must be given at least 6 weeks before the end of the term, otherwise the contract renews automatically for 12 months.

excluded: Acts of nature beyond standard warranty
maintenance_coverage.note: Maintenance is included for all Enpal-installed assets for the duration of the contract.
